'''Yaana''' was the [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] of [[Senali]], the daughter of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of Senali.

The laws of [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]] and Senali made the kings of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] exchange their firstborns when they were seven years old, in order to avoid a war. Yaana went to Rutan and was jailed by King [[Frane]]. [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] rescued her.

==Appearances==
